name: Sugared Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Fold the sugar and salt into the stiffly beaten egg whites.
2. Add the pecans to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Melt the margarine in a 9 x 12-inch pan.
4. Spread the nut mixture evenly in the pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes, stirring every 10 minutes.
6. Allow to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
